title: Syringe and auxiliary dosing device for syringe
abstract: An auxiliary dosing device (100) for a syringe (10) comprises a plunger rod (102, 502) having a proximal end and a distal end; and a dosing collar (104, 504) sleeved on a circumference of the plunger rod (102, 502) and movable axially along the plunger rod (102, 502). The dosing collar (104, 504) is configured to be rotatable relative to the plunger rod (102, 502) from a first position to a second position. When the dosing collar (104, 504) is circumferentially rotated from the first position to the second position, the plunger rod (102, 502) is movable axially relative to the dosing collar (104, 504) in a distal direction.
